name: Apple Music
description: Subscription music streaming with 100M+ songs, spatial audio, lossless quality, and seamless Apple device integration.

name: Bandcamp
description: Direct-to-fan music platform. Buy albums, tracks, and merch directly from artists. Artists keep 82-85% of revenue. Free to stream before you buy.

name: Last.fm
description: Music tracking and discovery platform. Scrobble songs from Spotify, Apple Music, and more to build your listening history and discover new artists via recommendations.

name: SoundCloud
description: Upload and discover audio from independent artists worldwide. Great for finding emerging music, mixes, and podcasts.

name: Spotify
description: Stream 100M+ songs, podcasts, and audiobooks. Build playlists, explore curated mixes, and listen offline with Premium.

name: Tidal
description: High-fidelity music streaming with lossless and Dolby Atmos audio. Jay-Z's platform offers MQA and 360 Reality Audio — the audiophile's streaming choice.

name: YouTube Music
description: Google's music streaming service with official tracks, covers, live sessions, and personalised mixes. Ad-free with YouTube Premium.

name: Spotify
description: Stream 100M+ songs, podcasts, and audiobooks. Discover new music with personalized playlists like Discover Weekly. Free with ads.

name: SoundCloud
description: The internet's largest open audio platform. Discover underground artists, upload your own tracks, and follow creators worldwide.

name: Musescore
description: Free and open-source music notation software. Compose, arrange, and share sheet music. Huge community library of scores.

name: Genius
description: Song lyrics, annotations, and meaning breakdowns. Community-annotated database covering virtually every song ever released.

name: Shazam
description: Identify any song playing around you. Also works as a music discovery tool with charts and artist radio.

name: Musixmatch
description: The world's largest lyrics platform. Synced lyrics in music apps, translation in 40+ languages, and a lyrics API.

name: Apple Music
description: 100M+ song streaming library with lossless and spatial audio. Deeply integrated with iPhone and Mac.

name: Deezer
description: Music streaming with Flow personalised radio and strong lyrics integration. Popular alternative outside the US.
